key_evidence: 'Rule of 70' voluntary buyout program: 8,750 US employees eligible (7% of domestic workforce); 30-day acceptance window through early June 2026; first such program in Microsoft's 51-year history

No Tech for Apartheid worker coalition (700,000 workers) joint statement explicitly named Microsoft alongside Amazon and Google in Pentagon-rejection demands — accountability-from-workers signal
Microsoft Israel/Unit 8200 accountability arc: GM fired, subsidiary restructured, access terminated (positive accountability response, documented in May 22-23 cycles)
Net direction: sub-threshold accumulator -1.9 from prior cycles remains active but with mixed signals; no apply-threshold crossing this cycle
